programme.desc:

🌊 Swell: 3.0m @ 15s 💨 Wind: 14.0km/h NNE (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 26.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.2m
📋 Long period - powerful waves

programme.desc:

programme.title: 🌊 2.5m @ 14s CROSS

programme.desc:
